summary_en: TAY TWO repurchases up to 1.85 million shares (2.89% of outstanding) for ¥248.2M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 20, 2026, to improve capital efficiency and maintain strategic flexibility.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock and Purchase of Treasury Stock via Off-hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: TAY TWO CO., LTD. (Code 7610, TSE Standard) announced on May 19, 2026, a treasury stock repurchase program authorized by board written resolution under the Company Law (Article 156, read in conjunction with Article 165(3)). The company will purchase up to 1,852,000 ordinary shares (2.89% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total of ¥248,168,000. The repurchase will be executed via ToSTNeT-3 (off-hours trading) on the Tokyo Stock Exchange on May 20, 2026, at 8:45 a.m., using the closing price from May 19, 2026 (134 yen per share, including final special quotations). The order is limited to that specific trading session only. The stated purpose is to enhance capital efficiency and maintain strategic flexibility in response to changing business conditions. Results will be announced immediately after trading concludes on May 20, 2026.
